quote: The Earth does not belong to us. We belong to the Earth.
author: Chief Seattle

quote: Reduce, Reuse, Recycle - it's not just a slogan, it's a way of life.
author: Unknown

quote: Nature is not a place to visit. It is home.
author: Gary Snyder

quote: We do not inherit the Earth from our ancestors; we borrow it from our children.
author: Native American Proverb

quote: Every piece of plastic ever made still exists.
author: Unknown

quote: Be the change you wish to see in the world.
author: Mahatma Gandhi

quote: A clean environment is a human right like any other.
author: Dalai Lama

quote: Sustainability is not a trend, it's a responsibility.
author: Unknown

quote: Small acts, when multiplied by millions of people, can transform the world.
author: Howard Zinn
